summary: Iteration 21: Tested multilingual auto-translation feature (PL/EN/DE/CS). Fixed critical bug in BalieLandingPage where tr() function was not destructured from useAutoTranslate hook. Backend /api/translate endpoint works correctly with GPT-4.1-nano and MongoDB caching. All language switchers work on /sauny, /, /balie, /blog pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilingual auto-translation feature fully working. Fixed BalieLandingPage.jsx bug where tr() was not destructured from useAutoTranslate(). Translation API uses GPT-4.1-nano with MongoDB caching in 'translations_cache' collection. Frontend uses localStorage caching. Language switcher implementations: 1) /sauny uses inline PL|EN|DE|CS bar with data-testid='lang-btn-{code}'. 2) /, /blog, /b2b, /balie use dropdown LanguageSwitcher with data-testid='lang-switcher-btn' and 'lang-option-{code}'. Static UI text uses dictionary in LanguageContext.js. Dynamic DB content uses tr() from AutoTranslateContext.js which batches texts and sends to /api/translate.

translate_api_endpoint.details: POST /api/translate works for en/de/cs languages, returns translations object, handles empty texts, rejects unsupported languages

translation_caching.details: MongoDB caching works - same request returns cached results

brand_name_preservation.details: WM-Sauna brand name preserved in translations

language_switcher_sauny.details: Inline PL|EN|DE|CS bar works, nav translates correctly for all 4 languages

language_switcher_main_landing.details: Dropdown LanguageSwitcher works, card titles translate via auto-translate

language_switcher_balie.details: Fixed bug - tr() now destructured from useAutoTranslate(), page loads without error

hero_badges_translation.details: Hero badges on /sauny translate: 'Polish production', 'Ready in 5-10 days', 'Warranty 24 months'

footer_translation.details: Footer on /sauny translates: 'Quick Links', 'Legal Information', 'Privacy Policy', etc.

default_language_polish.details: Default language is PL when localStorage is cleared

bug_fixed.root_cause: useAutoTranslate hook was imported but tr() function was never destructured from it
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'const { tr } = useAutoTranslate();' inside BalieLandingPage component
